close_reason: Implemented: direnv-lib.nix generates turnkey-direnv-lib.sh with use_turnkey function, tool paths, and language-specific regeneration based on toolchain.toml
description:
Create a Nix derivation that generates turnkey-direnv-lib.sh based on toolchain.toml configuration. The script should:

1. Read enabled languages from toolchain.toml (go, python, rust, etc.)
2. Generate regeneration blocks only for enabled languages
3. Generate watch_file entries only for relevant files
4. Include helper functions (_turnkey_hash_files, _turnkey_needs_regen, etc.)
5. Inject tool paths from Nix (godeps-gen, pydeps-gen, rustdeps-gen, uv)
6. Export via TURNKEY_DIRENV_LIB environment variable

This makes the script declarative - add 'python = {}' to toolchain.toml and the Python regeneration + watch_file entries appear automatically.
title: Generate turnkey-direnv-lib.sh from Nix
